title: Capless Perfume Bottle

imagePrompts.prompt:
PHASE 1 — FORM: A solid brushed aluminum glass teardrop, no cap, no nozzle, no visible opening — scent permeates through the glass

PHASE 2 — SURFACE: satin finish exterior, AURORA to the touch, weight of a river stone

PHASE 3 — LIGHTING: soft golden side light from front-facing hero composition, casting shadow type

PHASE 4 — SETTING: soft cream studio backdrop, premium editorial style editorial quality

Swap: brushed aluminum / satin finish / premium editorial style
